items.title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
items.summary: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Social media leaders called to Downing Street over children's safety
items.summary: Top executives from firms such as Meta and YouTube will be asked what they are doing to protect children.

items.title: Federal jury finds concert business Live Nation is a monopoly
